summary: Completed Phase 2 MVP testing for Family Fans Mony platform. Backend APIs are working correctly with 89.5% success rate. Frontend loads properly with Spanish UI, but has role-based redirection issues during registration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - correct behavior but different status code

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - correct behavior but different status code

critical_bugs.issue: Creator registration redirects to /fan instead of /creator dashboard

ui_bugs.issue: Some admin sidebar navigation links have incorrect data-testid attributes
Logout button selector inconsistent across dashboards

passed_tests: Admin login with edrianttrejol@gmail.com / Sportox@22 - redirects to /admin
Advertiser registration with anunciante@test.com / test123456 - redirects to /advertiser
Fan registration with fan@test.com / test123456 - redirects to /fan
Public home page loads with correct branding 'Family Fans Mony'
Admin dashboard shows KPIs (users, deposits, campaigns, commissions)
Advertiser dashboard shows deposit button and balance display
Fan dashboard shows explore tab with creator search
Backend API authentication flows working (17/19 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix creator registration redirection issue - currently redirects to /fan instead of /creator dashboard. Also fix admin sidebar navigation data-testid attributes for deposits and campaigns links.
